problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus may resolve What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
